## Summary

Describe the behavior, contract, or operational outcome changed by this pull request.

## Verification

- [ ] Relevant unit and integration tests pass.
- [ ] `go test -race ./...` passes for backend changes.
- [ ] Frontend test, typecheck, build, and Playwright checks pass for UI changes.
- [ ] OpenAPI, migration, event schema, metrics, and runbooks are updated when their contracts change.
- [ ] No secret, generated backup, local token, or private evaluation holdout content is committed.

## Risk And Rollback

State the main failure mode, data compatibility impact, and rollback procedure.
